typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: UsageAggregator.refreshAll() unconditionally calls runScheduledBackfillIfNeeded() even when persistence fails, allowing backfill cursor advancement without successful committed usage persistence.

Fix diff did not add runtime integration coverage for production backfill wiring (refreshAll/runScheduledBackfillIfNeeded); existing tests remain helper-level and do not validate the production path coexistence expectation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit command-level evidence for all mandated startup context reads before allowing skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true, and add this as a scrutiny checklist item.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three of four rerun reviews again reported missing read evidence for AGENTS.md and .factory/library docs despite handoffs claiming followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add mission-start guidance that workers should treat mission-scoped files as authoritative when shared library docs are stale/misaligned and explicitly note detected drift in handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple rerun reviews flagged .factory/library architecture/user-testing guidance as switcher-focused and misaligned with this token-accounting milestone.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated library-misalignment notes across multiple review reports.
